caption:
recorded my journey to the top of Sigiriya ancient rock fortress with @insta360 X3 ✨🛕🌄🌅🎥✨every journey begin with a single step @destination_srilanka ✨ just amazing climbing 1200+ steps to the top #srilanka #sigiriyarock #insta360X3 @insta360mysg #nodronenoproblem

transcription.text: Slip, slip, word upon your lip, lip Read a bit, you rip, rip Break me down and build me up Whatever it takes Cause I love the adrenaline in my veins I do whatever it takes Cause I love how it feels when I break the chains Whatever it takes You take me to the top, I'm ready for Whatever it takes Cause I love the adrenaline in my veins I do whatever it takes
